LanguageData.VFEPD_ArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken self propelled artillery. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArtilleryWreck.label: artillery wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Badger.description: A tracked, armoured fighting vehicle, the Badger is designed to transport scouts and infantry while providing covering fire to suppress enemy troops. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Badger.label: Badger
LanguageData.VFEPD_BattleTankWreck.description: An ancient, broken battle tank. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BattleTankWreck.label: battle tank wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigRig.description: A dedicated cargo transporter, the Big Rig is the epitome of bulk material transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigRig.label: Big Rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_Burya.description: A dedicated multiple launch rocket system platform, the Burya is a long-range siege and area denial weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Burya.label: Burya
LanguageData.VFEPD_CargoHelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, crashed cargo helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CargoHelicopterWreck.label: cargo helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClassicCarWreck.description: An ancient, broken classic car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClassicCarWreck.label: classical car wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Goliath.description: More of a movable mini-base than a deployment pod, Goliath is an expensive but powerful solution to any immovable enemy object. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Goliath.label: Goliath
LanguageData.VFEPD_HelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, broken helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HelicopterWreck.label: helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hermano.description: A dedicated refrigeration vehicle, the Hermano is a decent cargo transporter with a specific niche in ferrying perishable goods. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hermano.label: Hermano
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.descr: An ancient, broken infantry fighting vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.label: infantry fighting vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.descripti: An ancient, broken light armored vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.label: light armored vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lightning.description: A fast general purpose transporter, the Lightning is an excellent road vehicle for getting an appreciable amount of cargo in a very small time frame. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lightning.label: Lightning
LanguageData.VFEPD_Louie.description: An armoured transport aircraft, the Louie is a robust and agile mobile mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Louie.label: Louie
LanguageData.VFEPD_Marshal.description: A general main battle tank, the Marshal is an improved combat vehicle that performs well in any engagement. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Marshal.label: Marshal
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nomad.description: An armoured all-rounder vehicle, the Nomad performs remarkably well in all categories with an excellent cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nomad.label: Nomad
LanguageData.VFEPD_OffroadJeepWreck.description: An ancient, broken offroad jeep. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OffroadJeepWreck.label: offroad jeep wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Paladin.description: A general purpose armoured personnel carrier, the Paladin is a fast and hardy troop transport. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Paladin.label: Paladin
LanguageData.VFEPD_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken refrigerated truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.label: refrigerated truck wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_RocketArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken rocket artillery truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RocketArtilleryWreck.label: rocket artillery wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_SiegePodWreck.description: An ancient, destroyed siege pod. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SiegePodWreck.label: siege pod wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Springbok.description: A general all-rounder vehicle, the Springbok performs well in all categories with a good cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Springbok.label: Springbok
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupercarWreck.description: An ancient, broken supercar. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupercarWreck.label: supercar wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_TruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TruckWreck.label: truck wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Udar.description: A dedicated artillery unit, the Udar is a long-range siege weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Udar.label: Udar
